all.en: The Mid-Autumn Festival is one of my favorite holidays of the year.
all.zh: 中秋節是我一年中最喜歡的節日之一。

all.en: Our family always gathers on the rooftop to enjoy a barbecue together.
all.zh: 我們家總是聚在頂樓一起烤肉。

all.en: My father went to three different bakeries to find the best mooncakes.
all.zh: 爸爸跑了三家不同的糕餅店，只為了買到最棒的月餅。

all.en: He chose traditional ones with salted egg yolks and a few modern flavors.
all.zh: 他挑了傳統的蛋黃口味，也買了一些新潮的口味。

all.en: My mother marinated chicken wings, beef, and corn the night before.
all.zh: 媽媽前一晚就先醃好了雞翅、牛肉和玉米。

all.en: My younger brother set up the grill and started the charcoal carefully.
all.zh: 弟弟負責架烤爐，並小心地點燃木炭。

all.en: Smoke quickly rose into the cool evening air, and our neighbors waved hello.
all.zh: 煙很快升上涼爽的夜空，鄰居們也揮手打招呼。

all.en: While we ate, we admired how round and bright the full moon looked.
all.zh: 我們一邊吃，一邊欣賞又圓又亮的滿月。

all.en: My grandmother told us the old legend of Chang'e once again.
all.zh: 奶奶又一次為我們講起嫦娥的古老傳說。

all.en: Afterwards, we cut the mooncakes into small pieces and shared them slowly.
all.zh: 之後，我們把月餅切成小塊，慢慢分著吃。

all.en: That night I went to sleep feeling full, warm, and very loved.
all.zh: 那晚我帶著滿足、溫暖和滿滿的愛入睡。

all.en: The next morning, I woke up to find leftover mooncakes on the kitchen counter.
all.zh: 隔天早上，我醒來發現廚房檯面上還有吃剩的月餅。

all.en: My mother packed several boxes to give to our neighbors as a small gesture.
all.zh: 媽媽包了好幾盒，作為小小的心意分送給鄰居。

all.en: I delivered one box to the elderly couple who lived on the floor below us.
all.zh: 我送了一盒給住在我們樓下那對老夫婦。

all.en: They invited me in for tea and showed me old photos of their family festivals.
all.zh: 他們邀我進屋喝茶，並給我看他們家過節的老照片。

all.en: That afternoon, my cousins came over to play traditional pomelo hats with the kids.
all.zh: 那天下午，表哥表姐過來陪小孩子玩戴柚子皮帽的傳統遊戲。

all.en: We watched a documentary together about how mooncakes are made in different regions.
all.zh: 我們一起看了一部紀錄片，介紹不同地區月餅的製作方式。

all.en: My grandmother taught my niece how to make a simple lantern from red paper.
all.zh: 奶奶教我姪女用紅紙做一個簡單的燈籠。

all.en: In the evening, we walked through the park where children carried glowing lanterns.
all.zh: 傍晚，我們漫步在公園裡，看著孩子們提著發亮的燈籠。

all.en: My father said this year's gathering had been the most peaceful one in years.
all.zh: 爸爸說今年的聚會是這幾年來最祥和的一次。

all.en: I drifted to sleep thinking about how traditions truly hold families closely together.
all.zh: 我帶著傳統真能將家人緊密相連的想法，慢慢進入夢鄉。

all.en: A few days later, my father suggested we plan a small Mid-Autumn trip next year.
all.zh: 幾天後，爸爸提議我們明年中秋可以策劃一趟小小的旅行。

all.en: He wanted to visit a quiet mountain village known for its moon-viewing tradition.
all.zh: 他想去一座以賞月傳統聞名的寧靜山村。

all.en: My grandmother agreed, as long as someone would carry her extra cushion and blanket.
all.zh: 奶奶答應了，前提是要有人幫她帶額外的坐墊和毛毯。

all.en: My brother volunteered immediately, eager to drive the family's old van up the mountain.
all.zh: 弟弟立刻自告奮勇，迫不及待想開家裡那台老廂型車上山。

all.en: My mother began planning a portable picnic menu with foods that travel well.
all.zh: 媽媽開始規劃一份便於攜帶的野餐菜單，挑選耐放的食物。

all.en: She decided on cold sesame noodles, fruit skewers, and her famous five-spice tea eggs.
all.zh: 她決定做涼麵、水果串和她拿手的五香茶葉蛋。

all.en: My niece was placed in charge of decorations and rabbit-shaped paper lanterns.
all.zh: 我姪女負責裝飾物和兔子造型的紙燈籠。

all.en: I researched the local guesthouses online and booked two cozy rooms with garden views.
all.zh: 我上網查了當地的民宿，訂了兩間有花園景觀的舒適房間。

all.en: Each family member contributed a small task, which made everyone feel deeply included.
all.zh: 每位家人都負責一項小任務，讓大家都有滿滿的參與感。

all.en: Already the festival felt special, simply through the joy of planning it together.
all.zh: 光是一起籌劃，這個節日就已經因為共享的喜悅而格外特別。

all.en: The mountain village trip finally arrived after months of careful family planning and saving.
all.zh: 經過家人數月的精心籌劃與儲蓄，山村之旅終於成行了。

all.en: Our old van climbed slowly up the winding road as autumn leaves danced around us.
all.zh: 我們的老廂型車緩緩爬上蜿蜒的山路，秋葉在四周翩然飛舞。

all.en: The guesthouse owner welcomed us with hot ginger tea and freshly steamed taro buns.
all.zh: 民宿老闆以熱薑茶和現蒸的芋頭包子歡迎我們。

all.en: We unpacked quickly and headed to the village plaza for the local lantern parade.
all.zh: 我們迅速放下行李，前往村莊廣場觀賞當地的燈籠遊行。

all.en: My niece proudly carried her rabbit lantern while villagers complimented her careful handiwork.
all.zh: 我姪女驕傲地提著她的兔子燈籠，村民們紛紛稱讚她精細的手藝。

all.en: That night we sat on grass mats watching the full moon rise behind distant mountains.
all.zh: 那晚我們坐在草蓆上，看著滿月從遠方山巒後緩緩升起。

all.en: My grandmother shared moon legends she had heard from her own grandmother decades ago.
all.zh: 奶奶分享了幾十年前她從自己奶奶那兒聽來的月亮傳說。

all.en: My brother quietly recorded the stories on his phone for future generations to enjoy.
all.zh: 弟弟靜靜地用手機錄下這些故事，留給未來世代欣賞。

all.en: Before sleeping, we agreed that this trip should become our new annual family tradition.
all.zh: 入睡前，我們約定要把這趟旅行變成家族每年的新傳統。

all.en: Driving home Monday, I held my grandmother's hand and silently thanked her for everything.
all.zh: 週一開車回家的路上，我握著奶奶的手，默默感謝她所給予的一切。

all.en: The following spring, my grandmother became too frail to climb up to the mountain village again.
all.zh: 隔年春天，奶奶身體變得太虛弱，無法再爬上那座山村。

all.en: My brother quickly arranged a comfortable van with a special reclining seat for her trip.
all.zh: 弟弟迅速安排了一輛舒適的廂型車，並裝設可後傾的特別座椅供她乘坐。

all.en: My father carried her gently up the steep guesthouse stairs each evening without complaint.
all.zh: 父親每天傍晚不發一句怨言，溫柔地將她抱上民宿陡峭的樓梯。

all.en: This year, she insisted on teaching my niece her secret mooncake recipe before forgetting it.
all.zh: 今年她堅持在自己遺忘之前，把祕傳月餅食譜教給姪女。

all.en: They spent three quiet afternoons together kneading dough and shaping each tiny golden pastry.
all.zh: 她們花了三個寧靜的下午一起揉麵團，並為每塊金黃小點心塑形。

all.en: My niece carefully wrote down every measurement, technique, and small piece of family wisdom.
all.zh: 姪女仔細記下每一項份量、技巧，以及每一段小小的家族智慧。

all.en: On festival night, the entire family tasted my niece's first batch of homemade mooncakes.
all.zh: 中秋夜，全家人品嚐了姪女親手做的第一批月餅。

all.en: Grandma nodded slowly and whispered that the flavor was exactly as her own mother remembered.
all.zh: 奶奶緩緩點頭，輕聲說那滋味正是她母親記憶中的味道。

all.en: We took a long family photograph beneath the silver moonlight with grandma at the very center.
all.zh: 我們在銀色月光下拍了一張長合照，奶奶坐在最正中央。

all.en: That picture now hangs in every home, quietly reminding us of the recipe she lovingly passed down.
all.zh: 如今這張照片掛在每個家裡，靜靜提醒著我們她滿懷愛意傳承的食譜。

all.en: The following year, my grandmother passed away peacefully one quiet morning before the festival arrived.
all.zh: 隔年，奶奶在中秋節來臨前的一個寧靜清晨，安詳地離世了。

all.en: Our family gathered earlier than usual and decided to honor her by continuing every cherished tradition.
all.zh: 全家人比往常更早團聚，決定延續每一項珍貴的傳統來懷念她。

all.en: My niece took charge of the mooncake making, using grandma's handwritten recipe with quiet confidence.
all.zh: 姪女接下了製作月餅的責任，安靜而自信地依照奶奶手寫的食譜操作。

all.en: She wore grandma's old apron and tied her hair back exactly the way grandma always did.
all.zh: 她穿上奶奶的舊圍裙，並像奶奶一直以來的方式那樣將頭髮綁好。

all.en: On festival night, we drove back to the mountain village where grandma had loved gazing at the moon.
all.zh: 中秋夜，我們開車回到奶奶最愛賞月的那座山村。

all.en: We set up grass mats in her favorite spot and left an empty cushion in her honor.
all.zh: 我們在她最愛的地方鋪上草蓆，並留下一個空墊以紀念她。

all.en: My father quietly placed her favorite mooncake on the empty cushion before slicing the rest.
all.zh: 父親靜靜地把她最愛的月餅放在空墊上，然後才切開其餘的月餅。

all.en: My brother played the recordings of grandma's legends, and her gentle voice filled the cool air.
all.zh: 弟弟播放了奶奶口述傳說的錄音，她溫柔的聲音瀰漫在沁涼的空氣中。

all.en: My niece whispered the legend of Chang'e word for word along with the old recording.
all.zh: 姪女隨著那段舊錄音，一字一句地輕聲跟著念出嫦娥的傳說。

all.en: That night, the moon rose perfectly above the mountains, as if grandma was smiling down on us.
all.zh: 那一夜，月亮完美地升起於山巒之上，彷彿奶奶正含笑俯視著我們。

all.en: The next morning, my niece announced she wanted to learn every other recipe grandma had once made.
all.zh: 隔天早上，姪女宣布她想學會奶奶曾做過的所有其他食譜。

all.en: My mother smiled and began compiling a memory cookbook with handwritten notes from every family member.
all.zh: 母親微笑著開始彙整一本回憶食譜，收錄每位家人手寫的筆記。

all.en: My father contributed his memories of grandma's winter soups and her famous spring pickled radishes.
all.zh: 父親提供了關於奶奶冬日湯品和她著名春日醃蘿蔔的回憶。

all.en: My brother added stories about how grandma always cooked extra portions for any visiting neighbor children.
all.zh: 弟弟補充了奶奶總是多煮幾份給來訪鄰家小孩的故事。

all.en: I wrote about her gentle patience teaching me to fold dumplings during my own difficult teenage years.
all.zh: 我寫下她在我艱難的青少年時期，溫柔耐心地教我包水餃的回憶。

all.en: We printed twenty copies of the cookbook and gave one to every relative at the year-end gathering.
all.zh: 我們印了二十本食譜，並在年終聚會時送給每位親戚一本。

all.en: An aunt cried softly while reading the introduction my niece had written in her careful young handwriting.
all.zh: 一位姑姑讀著姪女用她稚嫩工整筆跡寫下的序言時，悄悄流下了淚水。

all.en: We decided to bring fresh copies to grandma's grave during the next Tomb Sweeping Festival visit.
all.zh: 我們決定在下一個清明節掃墓時，帶幾本新印的食譜到奶奶墳前。

all.en: Standing at her grave, my niece read aloud her favorite recipe and promised to cook it forever.
all.zh: 站在奶奶墓前，姪女朗讀了她最愛的食譜，並承諾會永遠繼續烹調它。

all.en: The wind blew gently through the pines, and somehow it felt like grandma was clapping for her.
all.zh: 微風輕輕拂過松林，那一刻彷彿是奶奶在為她鼓掌。

all.en: Every Mid-Autumn after that, we placed a small lantern at her grave before our family BBQ.
all.zh: 從那以後，每年中秋我們在烤肉前都會在她墳前點上一盞小燈籠。

all.en: My niece eventually compiled grandma's recipes into a small printed cookbook for the whole family.
all.zh: 我姪女後來把奶奶的食譜彙整成一本小型印刷食譜書，分送給全家人。

all.en: She included old photos of grandma cooking on the rooftop during past Mid-Autumn nights.
all.zh: 她在書裡收錄了奶奶在往年中秋夜頂樓做菜的舊照片。

all.en: Each cousin received a copy at our annual reunion, and many quietly wiped tears from their eyes.
all.zh: 每位表親在年度團聚時都拿到一本，許多人靜靜地拭去眼角的淚水。

all.en: My young cousin began cooking grandma's signature pork ribs at his college dormitory every autumn.
all.zh: 我的年輕表弟每年秋天都在大學宿舍料理奶奶招牌的烤豬肋排。

all.en: He sent photos to our family group chat and grandma's chair felt warmer with every message.
all.zh: 他把照片傳到家族群組，每一則訊息都讓奶奶的座位顯得更加溫暖。

all.en: Years later, my niece opened a small neighborhood eatery named after grandma's gentle childhood nickname.
all.zh: 多年後，我姪女開了一間小型社區食堂，以奶奶溫柔的童年小名命名。

all.en: The menu featured grandma's grilled corn, sweet sausages, and her famous five-spice marinated tofu.
all.zh: 菜單上有奶奶的烤玉米、甜香腸，以及她著名的五香滷豆腐。

all.en: Customers often left handwritten notes describing their own grandmothers' beloved holiday cooking memories.
all.zh: 顧客常留下手寫紙條，描述自己奶奶最珍愛的節日烹飪回憶。

all.en: We pinned every note onto a long wooden wall, building a slow mosaic of shared family love.
all.zh: 我們把每張紙條釘在一面長長的木牆上，慢慢拼成一幅共享家族愛的馬賽克。

all.en: On the eatery's first Mid-Autumn night, my niece closed early to host a private family-only barbecue.
all.zh: 食堂開幕後的第一個中秋夜，姪女提早打烊，舉辦一場只限家人的私下烤肉。

all.en: She rolled out the same charcoal grill my brother had once carefully lit on our rooftop years ago.
all.zh: 她推出了多年前弟弟曾在頂樓小心點燃的同一個炭烤爐。

all.en: My father brought three boxes of mooncakes from grandma's favorite old bakery across the river.
all.zh: 父親從河對岸奶奶最愛的老糕餅店帶來三盒月餅。

all.en: My young cousin drove down from his new apartment, balancing two coolers of marinated meat in the back seat.
all.zh: 年輕表弟從他新公寓開車南下，後座放著兩個裝滿醃肉的保冷箱。

all.en: My niece pinned a small framed photo of grandma above the cash register so she could watch over everyone.
all.zh: 姪女在收銀機上方釘了一張奶奶的小裱框照片，好讓她能看顧所有人。

all.en: We pulled three tables together in the corner and ate slowly under strings of warm yellow festival lights.
all.zh: 我們把三張桌子併在角落，在一串串溫黃的節慶燈下慢慢用餐。

all.en: My niece served her first homemade mooncake of the night to the empty chair beside my father.
all.zh: 姪女把當晚第一塊親手做的月餅，端給父親身邊的那張空椅子。

all.en: He smiled gently and quietly thanked her in the same soft voice grandma always used at the table.
all.zh: 父親溫柔地微笑，用奶奶以前在餐桌上慣有的輕柔語調靜靜向她道謝。

all.en: Outside the window, the full moon rose perfectly between two old apartment buildings on the narrow street.
all.zh: 窗外，滿月完美地升起於窄街兩棟舊公寓之間。

all.en: Walking home that night with leftover ribs in a small paper bag, I felt grandma walking quietly beside me.
all.zh: 那晚提著紙袋裝的剩排骨走路回家時，我感覺奶奶安靜地走在我身旁。

all.en: Every year my mom buys way too many pomelos for the festival.
all.zh: 每年我媽都會買太多柚子來過節。

all.en: We carry the grill up to the rooftop before the sun sets.
all.zh: 我們在太陽下山前把烤肉架搬上頂樓。

all.en: Can you light the charcoal while I marinate the chicken?
all.zh: 你能去點炭火嗎？我來醃雞肉。

all.en: The full moon looked especially bright and round last night.
all.zh: 昨晚的滿月看起來特別明亮又圓。

all.en: My cousins fought over the last grilled corn on the cob.
all.zh: 我的表兄弟姊妹為了最後一根烤玉米搶來搶去。

all.en: Grandma sliced the mooncakes into tiny pieces so everyone could share.
all.zh: 奶奶把月餅切成小塊，讓大家都能分到。

all.en: Don't forget to wrap some sausages in foil for the kids.
all.zh: 別忘了用錫箔紙包些香腸給小孩吃。

all.en: We sat in a circle and told silly stories until midnight.
all.zh: 我們圍成一圈，講著傻氣的故事直到半夜。

all.en: The smoke made my eyes water, but I couldn't stop smiling.
all.zh: 煙燻得我眼睛流淚，但我還是忍不住一直笑。

all.en: Sharing food under the moonlight makes the whole family feel closer.
all.zh: 在月光下一起吃東西，讓全家人感覺更親近了。
